title: 📈 Lyapunov Exponent (Chaos Sensitivity)
name: Lyapunov Exponent (Chaos Sensitivity)
what_it_is: Measures how sensitive a system is to initial conditions—the famous “butterfly effect.” High Lyapunov = chaotic, low = stable.
how_to_use: the shimmer of her body reflects high Lyapunov variance—colors shift at the smallest input
space around her flickers with sensitivity—a chaos field tuned to emotion
animation_behavior: Subtle reactions to slight motion, micro-changes ripple outward in light ---
